title: Colored Names
description: Simple client side mod to change your nametags color ingame.
body:
# Colored Names
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Colored Names is one of the first client side mods to change the color of your nametag. It also features a ingame colorwheel and it even allows you to save your gradients.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
## What it features:
- Saveble Presets 📁
- gradients and single colors 🎨
- Ingame colorwheel 🟢🟠🟡🔴
- You can also see your friends Colored Nametags 🤝
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
The mod is made for 1.21.1, 1.21.5 and 1.21.11
